buildCommand: if [ -n "$STUDIO_URL" ]; then sed -i 's|{{STUDIO_URL}}|'"$STUDIO_URL"'|g' index.html; else echo 'Warning: STUDIO_URL env var not set; frontend will fall back to ws://localhost:3002'; fi && if [ -n "$STUDIO_SECRET" ]; then sed -i 's|{{STUDIO_SECRET}}|'"$STUDIO_SECRET"'|g' index.html; else echo 'Warning: STUDIO_SECRET env var not set; frontend will connect without a token (only works if worker has no STUDIO_SECRET either)'; fi
